title: Trump's renewed threats against the European automotive industry further undermine the Turnberry deal

title: Stars shine at the 2026 Met Gala despite Bezos co-chair controversy
subhed: The glitzy annual fashion event has drawn controversy after Amazon billionaire Jeff Bezos and his wife Lauren Sanchez Bezos were announced as lead sponsors and honorary co-chairs of the gala. Vogue's global editorial director Anna Wintour, who has helmed the event for 30 years, insisted the couple 'genuinely care about giving back.'

title: Swedish government's anti-immigrant escalation sparks backlash among population
